svg.title: Geometry bay — 3D wireframe render, pure SVG SMIL
svg.desc: Three animated 3D wireframes rendered with no JavaScript and no CSS: a rotating cube with perspective depth, a spinning globe of meridians with orbiting packets, and a tumbling octahedron — a render test for the agent runtime by Ray Lin, agentic systems engineer.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', 'Liberation Mono', monospace

svg.text: geometry-bay --render wireframe · pure-smil 3d — no js, no css
